# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Cached CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop, 'feature/**']
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'

jobs:
  cache-and-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    strategy:
      matrix:
        environment: [development, staging, production]

    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Cache: node_modules based on package-lock.json hash
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: cache-node-modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'package.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Cache: pip packages based on requirements hash
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Get pip cache directory
        id: pip-cache-dir
        run: echo "dir=$(pip cache dir)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Cache pip packages
        id: cache-pip
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ${{ steps.pip-cache-dir.outputs.dir }}
            .venv
          key: pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('requirements*.txt', 'setup.py', 'setup.cfg', 'pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Cache: Environment-specific configuration files
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Cache environment configs
        id: cache-env-configs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
            config/${{ matrix.environment }}
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            .editorconfig
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            tox.ini
            mypy.ini
            .flake8
          key: env-configs-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ hashFiles('.env.*', 'config/**', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig*.json', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg') }}
          restore-keys: |
            env-configs-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Cache: Build outputs
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Cache build outputs
        id: cache-build
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            .next
            .nuxt
            __pycache__
            *.egg-info
          key: build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ hashFiles('src/**', 'lib/**', 'app/**', 'pages/**') }}
          restore-keys: |
            build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Install dependencies only if cache missed
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Install Node.js dependencies
        if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          # Run scripts separately after install for security
          npm rebuild

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.cache-pip.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m venv .venv
          source .venv/bin/activate
          pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements-dev.txt; fi

      - name: Activate Python venv for subsequent steps
        run: echo "${{ github.workspace }}/.venv/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Generate environment-specific config (non-secret values only)
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Generate environment config
        run: |
          CONFIG_DIR="config/${{ matrix.environment }}"
          mkdir -p "$CONFIG_DIR"

          # Only write non-sensitive configuration values
          cat > "$CONFIG_DIR/app.json" <<EOF
          {
            "environment": "${{ matrix.environment }}",
            "log_level": "${{ matrix.environment == 'production' && 'warn' || 'debug' }}",
            "enable_debug": ${{ matrix.environment != 'production' }},
            "api_version": "v1",
            "cache_ttl": ${{ matrix.environment == 'production' && 3600 || 60 }},
            "build_timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.sha }}"
          }
          EOF

          echo "Generated config for ${{ matrix.environment }}"
          cat "$CONFIG_DIR/app.json"

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Security: Audit dependencies
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Audit Node.js dependencies
        continue-on-error: true
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Audit Python dependencies
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          pip install pip-audit
          pip-audit --strict --desc

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Lint
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Lint Node.js code
        run: |
          if npm run lint --if-present 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "Node.js linting passed"
          else
            echo "No lint script found or linting skipped"
          fi

      - name: Lint Python code
        run: |
          if command -v flake8 &> /dev/null; then
            flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics
          else
            echo "flake8 not installed, skipping Python lint"
          fi

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Build
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Build Node.js project
        if: steps.cache-build.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        env:
          NODE_ENV: ${{ matrix.environment }}
          CI: true
        run: |
          if npm run build --if-present 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "Build completed successfully"
          else
            echo "No build script found"
          fi

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Test
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Run Node.js tests
        env:
          NODE_ENV: test
          CI: true
        run: |
          if npm test --if-present 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "Node.js tests passed"
          else
            echo "No test script found"
          fi

      - name: Run Python tests
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ matrix.environment }}
        run: |
          if command -v pytest &> /dev/null; then
            pytest --tb=short -q || echo "No Python tests found"
          else
            echo "pytest not installed, skipping Python tests"
          fi

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Cache diagnostics
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Cache hit summary
        run: |
          echo "## Cache Summary for ${{ matrix.environment }}" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Cache | Hit |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|-------|-----|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| node_modules | ${{ steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit || 'false' }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| pip packages | ${{ steps.cache-pip.outputs.cache-hit || 'false' }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| env configs | ${{ steps.cache-env-configs.outputs.cache-hit || 'false' }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| build outputs | ${{ steps.cache-build.outputs.cache-hit || 'false' }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      # Upload artifacts securely
      # -----------------------------------------------------------
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: matrix.environment == 'production' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ github.sha }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  # -----------------------------------------------------------
  # Cleanup stale caches on PR merge
  # -----------------------------------------------------------
  cache-cleanup:
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.action == 'closed'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      actions: write
    steps:
      - name: Cleanup PR caches
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const ref = `refs/pull/${context.payload.pull_request.number}/merge`;
            const caches = await github.rest.actions.getActionsCacheList({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              ref: ref,
            });
            for (const cache of caches.data.actions_caches) {
              console.log(`Deleting cache: ${cache.key}`);
              await github.rest.actions.deleteActionsCacheById({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                cache_id: cache.id,
              });
            }
            console.log(`Cleaned up ${caches.data.total_count} caches for PR #${context.payload.pull_request.number}`);
